channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: College Football Playoff preview: Clemson’s win sets up controversy with Alabama, SMU dueling for the final spot
item.description: Clemson put the College Football Playoff selection committee in a bad spot with its victory in the ACC championship game.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: No. 1 Oregon outlasts No. 3 Penn State 45-37 for Big Ten title and 1st-round bye in playoffs
item.description: Dillon Gabriel threw four touchdown passes and No. 1 Oregon outlasted No. 3 Penn State 45-37 on Saturday night in the Big Ten championship, giving the Ducks a first-round bye and almost certainly the top seed in the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: Michael Marot, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Jokic's career high of 56 points comes during a low point for the Nuggets
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Nikola Jokic scored a career-high 56 points and had little to celebrate afterward. It happened in a loss — to a team that hadn't won since October. “I think today and the last couple games were really bad for us,” Jokic said. “We are really going in the wrong direction.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Oregon, Penn State amass 55 points to set Big Ten title game 1st-half scoring record
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Oregon and Penn State piled up seven touchdowns, 537 yards, 28 first downs and 55 points in the Big Ten title game Saturday night. That was in the first half. The top-ranked Ducks headed into halftime with a 31-24 lead.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Anders Sorensen loses 1st game as interim Blackhawks coach
item.description: Anders Sorensen's first game with Chicago looked a lot like when Luke Richardson was coaching the Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Georgia QB Carson Beck returns from hand injury for final snap in SEC championship OT win over Texas
item.description: Georgia quarterback Carson Beck, believed to be out for the remainder of the game with a hand injury, returned for the final snap in the Bulldogs’ 22-19 overtime victory over Texas in the Southeastern Conference championship game.
item.dc:creator: Charles Odum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Texas native Amber Glenn wins biggest US women's figure skating title in 14 years, beating Japan's stars
item.description: Amber Glenn won the first women's singles final gold medal at the figure skating Grand Prix for the U.S. since 2010, and she could make her first Olympics.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No. 16 Iowa State falls short in Big 12 title game again, this time with CFP at stake
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — The stakes were higher for Iowa State, and the outcome was the same as the first for the Cyclones in their second trip to the Big 12 championship game. And the 112-year wait for a conference title will go on. No.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL closes probe of latest Deshaun Watson sexual assault allegations without discipline
item.description: An NFL spokesperson said the investigation into the most recent sexual assault allegations against Browns QB Deshaun Watson is now considered closed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: St John's coach Rick Pitino pays homage to late school legend Lou Carnesecca with vintage look
item.description: In St. John's' first game since Lou Carnesecca's death, Rick Pitino honored the legendary head coach with a vintage sweater in the arena that bears "Looie's" name.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Everton vs. Liverpool postponed because of Storm Darragh. Other Premier League games remain on
item.description: LIVERPOOL, England (AP) — The Merseyside derby between Everton and Liverpool was postponed on Saturday because of Storm Darragh, which brought dangerous winds and heavy rain to the west coast. The Premier League match was due to kick off at 12.30 p.m. U.K.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 10 Boise State grabs CFP spot, beating No. 19 UNLV 21-7 in Mountain West championship
item.description: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — Ashton Jeanty ran for 209 yards and a touchdown and No. 10 Boise State earned a College Football Playoff spot, beating No. 19 UNLV 21-7 on Friday night for its second straight Mountain West title. Boise State (12-1, No.
item.dc:creator: JASON CHATRAW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scores: 2024 CIF State Regional Playoffs
item.description: BAKERSFIELD, Calif. (KGET) -- All eyes will be focused on the Frontier Titans football program as they host the Murrieta Mesa Rams Friday night and the Bakersfield Christian Eagles on Saturday, when they make the trip to Torrance Saturday evening.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Eyraud, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jacob Trouba isn't pleased with the Rangers' handling of his departure in a trade with Anaheim
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Jacob Trouba is finally out of New York after months of public trade rumors and private threats from the Rangers, who were determined to get rid of their captain and his massive contract.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jake Paul jokes that next opponent is 392-year-old shark
item.description: With all the jokes about Jake Paul's opponents, the YouTuber-turned-boxer joined in on the fun, saying his next opponent is a 392-year-old shark.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: MLS Cup championship sold out as Los Angeles Galaxy shoot for 6th title
item.description: It will be a packed crowd Saturday when the Los Angeles Galaxy attempt to capture their league-record sixth MLS Cup. The Galaxy will face off with the New York Red Bulls at Dignity Health Sports Park at 1 p.m., and team officials said tickets have sold out.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Jets take on the Blackhawks Saturday following overtime win
item.description: Winnipeg Jets (19-8, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (8-16-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 4 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Winnipeg Jets visit the Chicago Blackhawks after the Jets defeated the Buffalo Sabres 3-2 in overtime.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chicago Blackhawks fire Luke Richardson, IceHogs' Sorensen named interim head coach
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Chicago Blackhawks General Manager Kyle Davidson announced Thursday the team has fired head coach Luke Richardson. Rockford IceHogs head coach Anders Sorensen has been named interim head coach and will assume duties immediately.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Cougars go cold in 83-64 loss at Providence
item.description: PROVIDENCE, R.I. (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team suffered its worst shooting performance of the season and lost at Providence Tuesday night, 83-64 to fall to 6-2 on the season. The Cougars shot just 33.3 percent from the field in scoring a season-low 64 points.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former Padres catcher Kyle Higashioka signs with Texas Rangers
item.description: Free agent catcher Kyle Higashioka and the Texas Rangers agreed Monday night on a $13.5 million, two-year contract that includes a mutual option for the 2027 season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays respond to Pinellas commissioner's letter on stadium deal
item.description: The President of the Tampa Bay Rays has sent a response letter to the Pinellas County Board of County Commissioners following the letter to the baseball team last week.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC
